prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: derive a Time Travelers Scavenger Marksman from the approved Aion Trooper faction anchor and the original Time Travelers concept art
Subject: a lean post-apocalyptic rifleman in the same Time Travelers faction language, with a sealed helmet or half-mask variant, lighter segmented armor than Aion Trooper, a long scavenged marksman rifle, patched expedition pouches, and a steady ranged-combat stance
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D unit sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics art, consistent with the approved Aion Trooper runtime asset
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, grounded stance, tight sprite bounds, readable when rendered around 100 to 110 px tall in battle
Lighting/mood: restrained cold reactor light with subtle edge highlights, practical and battle-worn rather than flashy
Color palette: cold reactor white, weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, muted cloth gray
Constraints: transparent background, preserve the Time Travelers silhouette language from the references, exactly one subject, larger readable shapes, reduced micro-detail for downscaling, no floor, no scenery, no text, no extra subjects, no oversized empty padding
Avoid: glossy sci-fi armor, anime rendering, black tactical modern-military gear, giant shoulder cannons, glowing hologram spam, cinematic background
